who: transportation logistics managers processing 10–20 fleet vehicles
offer: For transportation logistics managers processing 10–20 fleet vehicles, inaccurate maintenance forecasting causes unexpected vehicle downtime. We provide predictive maintenance alerts instead of manual tracking of maintenance schedules and vehicle conditions.
problem: Inaccurate maintenance forecasting leads to unexpected vehicle downtime.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to logistics managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for fleet management
try_it: Let users try manual entry of vehicle maintenance records and basic reporting on maintenance history on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
